tracks.title: say goodbye
tracks.lyrics:
[00:36.65] Every time we talk I fake my personality
[00:40.11] Because I'm too insecure
[00:42.15] And I'm scared of what you'll think
[00:44.40] I know it sounds so wrong
[00:46.28] But i don't want you to leave
[00:48.56] You like when I'm a stranger
[00:50.28] But you don't like when I'm me
[00:53.34] We are the same
[00:56.68] But you don't even know that I cover my face
[01:01.42] My hearts a lie
[01:05.05] And if you'd figure out you would say goodbye
[01:08.96] I want to be like someone else
[01:12.91] 'cause you don't like me for myself
[01:17.05] I tried to be with you, I do
[01:21.36] Baby what do you want more
[01:34.03] We are the same
[01:37.38] But you don't even know that I cover my face
[01:42.14] My hearts a lie
[01:45.59] And if you'd figure out you would say goodbye
[01:50.42] We are the same
[01:53.54] But you don't even know that I cover my face
[01:58.48] My hearts a lie
[02:01.75] And if you'd figure out you would say goodbye
[02:07.03]

tracks.title: Cavetown вҖ“ "Talk To Me" (Official Audio)
tracks.lyrics:
[00:16.31] You don't have to be a hero to save the world
[00:23.51] It doesn't make you a narcissist to love yourself
[00:30.94] It feels like nothing is easy, it'll never be
[00:37.06] That's alright, let it out, talk to me
[00:42.90] 
[00:45.72] You don't have to be a prodigy to be unique
[00:53.02] You don't have to know what to say or what to think
[01:00.43] You don't have to be anybody you can never be
[01:06.81] That's alright, let it out, talk to me
[01:15.07] Anxiety, tossing, turning in your sleep
[01:21.53] Even if you run away, you still see them in your dreams
[01:28.93] It's so dark tonight, but you'll survive, certainly
[01:43.63] It's alright, come inside, and talk to me
[01:53.84] 
[01:55.99] 
[01:58.48] We can talk here on the floor
[02:02.45] On the phone, if you prefer
[02:06.19] I'll be here until you're okay
[02:13.14] Let your words release your pain
[02:16.79] You and I will share the weight
[02:20.57] Growing stronger day by day
[02:28.08] It's so dark outside tonight
[02:35.38] Build a fire warm and bright
[02:42.90] And the wind, it howls and bites
[02:50.33] Bite it back with all your might
[03:00.19] 
[03:13.27] Anxiety, tossing, turning in your sleep
[03:20.46] Even if you run away, you still see them in your dreams
[03:28.36] It's so dark tonight, it looks nice, fall asleep
[03:44.21] It's alright, come inside
[03:53.64] And talk to me
[03:56.32]

tracks.title: M@GICALвҳҶCURE! LOVE SHOT! (feat. Hatsune Miku)
tracks.lyrics:
[00:00.37] Hello everyone!
[00:01.95] I'm Hatsune Miku, a virtual Idol
[00:05.22] Well that's what everyone seems to think
[00:07.42] But secretly, I'm- (hehe)
[00:09.78] гҒҶгӮҠгӮғ гҒҠгҒ„! гҒҶгӮҠгӮғ гҒҠгҒ„! Ooh, fighter!
[00:12.39] Super powerful Miku-Chan
[00:14.70] гҒҶгӮҠгӮғ гҒҠгҒ„! гҒҶгӮҠгӮғ гҒҠгҒ„! Ooh, cyber!
[00:17.34] Miku, Miku, Miku, go!
[00:19.76] I wake up to a call, put my frilly outfit on now
[00:22.36] It's time I open up my eyes and start the day
[00:24.79] I combat 'til the dawn, until every villain's gone, wah!
[00:27.32] A clumsy trip and now I've fallen to my butt
[00:29.68] With my magical phone and a silly little ringtone
[00:32.58] I'll shout a magic word and set the world in place
[00:34.66] Whatever it may cost, there's no reason to stop
[00:37.03] For a world that I cherish and love
[00:38.93] Monsters might be a scary foe to fight
[00:42.74] But I'll take the stand
[00:44.67] If I can stop your tears and wipe them dry
[00:47.35] (I'll make you feel magical)
[00:49.29] If my pain's a type of cure for peace, I don't mind
[00:51.88] I can play as a nurse healing you everyday
[00:54.63] So what if I might shed a tear, get some bruises?
[00:57.06] A wipe is all I need to clean the cherry blush away, ha!
[00:59.90] Fighting through the night, but I'm wide awake
[01:01.77] It can all be so hard for me to get through the day
[01:04.48] Your smile is enough to heal all my aches
[01:06.71] Wrapped in a cute band-aid
[01:09.37] I can take the pain, fight all day, fill up the syringe with love
[01:12.70] Heal up the world and go again
[01:14.95] гҒҶгӮҠгӮғ гҒҠгҒ„! гҒҶгӮҠгӮғ гҒҠгҒ„! Ooh, fighter!
[01:17.24] Super powerful Miku-Chan
[01:19.85] гҒҶгӮҠгӮғ гҒҠгҒ„! гҒҶгӮҠгӮғ гҒҠгҒ„! Ooh, cyber!
[01:22.27] Miku, Miku, Miku, go!
[01:25.07] And now, it's time for the moment you've been waiting for!
[01:29.84] One, two, three
[01:33.47] Ready?
[01:34.27] Miku, Miku beam! (Keep going!)
[01:44.08] On my own, without anyone to know
[01:47.93] How my job's not all rainbows
[01:50.33] But then, I think about your smile
[01:52.48] (Your words are so lyrical)
[01:54.26] I'm a magically bright invincible girl
[01:56.82] If you need me to heal, go on and call out my name
[01:59.47] When you find yourself going down a spiral
[02:02.02] I'll bonk away what puts you down, a pink hammer melee, ya!
[02:04.76] Fighting through the night, but I'm wide awake
[02:06.80] All alone, it's so hard for me to get through the rain
[02:09.67] Your smile is enough to make my day
[02:12.03] So I stand tall and brave
[02:14.37] 'Cause I'm not afraid, any pain, I can laugh away, chin up
[02:17.56] With love, I'll fight on 'til the end
[02:20.08] 
[02:39.91] Bearing through the pain, I try to be brave
[02:44.69] As long as you can stay happy, I'm okay
[02:48.43] I'm not gonna bend, ha!
[02:49.92] I can be a cure for peace in your heart
[02:51.77] And I'll play as a nurse healing you every day
[02:54.62] Your smile is enough to heal all my aches
[02:56.73] All in a cute band-aid
[02:59.44] If you're feeling pain, call my name, I'll be by your side
[03:02.03] 'Til I see your smile beam bright again
[03:04.89] гҒҶгӮҠгӮғ гҒҠгҒ„! гҒҶгӮҠгӮғ гҒҠгҒ„! Ooh, fighter!
[03:07.29] Super powerful Miku-Chan
[03:09.79] гҒҶгӮҠгӮғ гҒҠгҒ„! гҒҶгӮҠгӮғ гҒҠгҒ„! Ooh, cyber!
[03:12.16] Miku, Miku, Miku, go!
[03:15.86] гҒӮгҒӮ... зң гҒ„гӮҲ
[03:18.43]

tracks.title: Static
tracks.lyrics:
[00:05.12] 1 2 3, tap your feet, such a classic melody
[00:10.13] 1 2 3, you know the words, so sing along with me

[00:30.88] (It's just another day it's just another day)

[00:39.10] The world you know, always running to and fro

We're twin flames, got it?
Hurry

Now, become one with me
Come, purify your soul, harmonize with death
Pretty please, turn into light
Throw everything away, poi

tracks.title: BUTCHER VANITY
tracks.lyrics:
[00:01.63] They say my hunger's a problem
[00:04.50] They tell me to curb my appetite
[00:08.44] They say I can't keep myself
[00:10.23] From trying a bite of every plate in sight
[00:14.47] They worship patience, a virtue
[00:17.80] Oh, they tell me gluttony's a sin
[00:21.80] But my desire, it's bottomless
[00:24.31] I wanna slit your throat and eat 'til I get sick (whoo!)
[00:28.13] The slaughter's on
[00:29.73] I'd love to see you come undone
[00:31.41] Unsatisfied
[00:33.30] Until I've got you flayed alive
[00:34.56] So grab a plate, have a taste
[00:36.57] йҖҷеҸЈе‘іи®“жҲ‘жІүйҶү
[00:38.44] I'm still preying on a butcher's vein
[00:45.71] To truss you up in pretty patterns
[00:48.78] Oh, to dress your flesh up with the works
[00:52.31] Perfectly portioned by a dagger
[00:54.53] Serving the finest leftover dessert
[00:58.44] Why would I desecrate a carcass?
[01:02.04] Oh, why let the offal go to waste?
[01:05.21] It's love that guides my cleaver with such tenderness
[01:08.65] A perfect strike to fix the horror on your face! (Ha-ha-ha, whoo!)
[01:12.28] The slaughter's mine
[01:13.64] Oh, blood and viscera divine
[01:15.46] Preserved and primed
[01:16.85] Each muscle divvied up to dine
[01:18.89] And in the high жҲ‘еӯҳеңЁ
[01:20.62] Tasting иЎҖж·Ӣж·Ӣзҡ„ж„ӣ
[01:22.07] I'll devour all of you in time
[01:25.97] Oh, your heart
[01:27.45] Aortic work of art
[01:29.36] My love, my knife
[01:30.90] To carve it out, your life
[01:32.28] So grab a plate, have a taste
[01:34.04] йҖҷеҸЈе‘іи®“жҲ‘жІүйҶү
[01:35.70] I'm still preying on a butcher's vein
[01:39.77] To snap the sinew
[01:41.05] I want to get within you
[01:42.62] I want to not forgive you
[01:44.20] Rigor mortis, mold and mildew
[01:45.95] But, dear, you should be grateful
[01:47.42] That I won't waste a good meal
[01:49.37] That all my love's precision
[01:51.01] Carves a cut to simply die for (huh?)
[01:53.26] To snap the sinew
[01:54.59] I want to get within you
[01:56.30] I want to scar the tissue
[01:57.87] Butterfly and rectify you
[01:59.50] I need to be your afterlife
[02:01.34] Eucharist, I deify
[02:03.01] God, oh, fuck the fork and knife
[02:04.81] I'll rip in hands and teeth and take a bite!
[02:11.09] (Whoo!)
[02:11.41] The slaughter's on
[02:12.95] I'd love to see you come undone
[02:14.76] Unsatisfied
[02:16.15] Until I've got you flayed alive
[02:17.85] So grab a plate, have a taste
[02:19.19] йҖҷеҸЈе‘іи®“жҲ‘жІүйҶү
[02:21.33] I'm still preying on a butcher's vein
[02:24.53] And now the slaughter's mine
[02:26.34] My darling, get under the knife
[02:28.18] Your broken pride
[02:29.74] A cut so perfect in its prime
[02:31.40] All that I see, 63 degree
[02:33.03] зӮәи®“жҲ‘еҝғйҶүзҡ„дҪ 
[02:34.64] I'll be waiting so impatiently
[02:38.38] Oh, your heart
[02:40.37] Aortic work of art
[02:41.85] My love, my knife
[02:43.50] To carve it out, your life
[02:45.14] So grab a plate, have a taste
[02:46.68] йҖҷеҸЈе‘іи®“жҲ‘жІүйҶү
[02:48.27] I'm still preying on a butcher's vein
[03:02.06] Still praying, hopeless and in vain
[03:04.93]

tracks.title: DELAYED
tracks.lyrics:
[00:20.70] Just one more scroll, I swear
[00:21.99] I know, near 1AM and I have lots of things on my to-do list
[00:24.35] My eyes barely stay open, but IвҖҷm not pulling this act on purpose
[00:27.84] In bed, feeling so comfortable
[00:29.59] CanвҖҷt move, IвҖҷll ignore all the calls
[00:31.32] Maybe if IвҖҷm here long enough
[00:33.03] Every task I have can just crumble
[00:34.76] Still, itвҖҷs hiding in plain sight
[00:36.36] I canвҖҷt deny itвҖҷs my own fight
[00:37.87] But IвҖҷll just do it tomorrow
[00:39.51] IвҖҷm sure thereвҖҷs nothing that could go wrong
[00:43.15] Hey itвҖҷs me
[00:43.56] RIP
[00:44.12] ItвҖҷs written on my gravestone
[00:46.59] Did my best
[00:47.07] SOS
[00:47.37] IвҖҷll do nothing and stay home
[00:48.49] I canвҖҷt control this reflex of mine
[00:50.73] To stray off task
[00:54.88] Well, fuck!
[00:55.72] IвҖҷve done it again!
[00:56.81] My problems overspilled
[00:58.25] All the things that I need to do have
[01:00.37] Been pushed back by my wants

[01:06.00] WonвҖҷt let me out of its grasp

tracks.title: phony
tracks.lyrics:
[00:03.82] They say flowers fade
[00:04.98] And their beauty can't be weighed with flowers so fake
[00:08.69] It's all because the way things are made, live on lies that fabricate
[00:12.73] Antipathy world
[00:30.40] I'll raise, right away, my umbrella that will shade my body from rain
[00:35.55] Now dampened by the pain, can't escape, here my bangs and heart remain
[00:39.56] All the trouble I face
[00:41.19] Before I knew, it withers way too soon, that one word that rings true
[00:44.67] And now, a fruit will bloom in my heart, I can't move
[00:47.56] Within the mirror's sight, there's a painting inside
[00:50.36] A sign of "makeup" lighting the loss in my life
[00:52.95] Pa-rap-pa-ra-pa-pa-ra-pa-pa-pa
[00:55.71] Let's play this game where we count the riddles that we made
[00:58.55] Tar-ra-ta-ra-tat-ta-ta-ta-ta
[01:00.68] Why stay, why stay in this place and dance the night away?
[01:04.44] I just can't see these simple things I can't keep
[01:07.16] What am I supposed to be?
[01:09.52] Shaken by the hand of night, it seems, stirring in a dream
[01:12.35] Like your love for me (it's leaving, it's leaving)
[01:15.67] I would cry and weep without a "bye" as I grieve
[01:18.40] Phony, phony, phony
[01:20.44] Still tangled up in lies, I see I'm just a fake, phony
[01:26.27] Antipathy world
[01:38.00] Before I knew, the sky, so very blue, joined an ugly old tune
[01:41.15] My colored view of you breaks away what you do
[01:43.92] Within the mirror's sight, there, I'm missing inside
[01:46.71] There lies a "fake" that's hiding the truth they can't find
[01:49.72] I say, why live and stay
[01:51.32] Where everybody craves that thing known as love
[01:53.46] That will only bring us pain?
[01:55.19] I play and swim today as I am left behind in every way by the train
[01:59.98] So dance the night away and
[02:00.99] Pa-pa-ra-pa-pa-ra-rap-pap-pa
[02:02.87] We meant pretense as we sang with riddles in the end
[02:06.43] Ta-rat-ta-ta-tat-ta-ta-ra-ta-ta
[02:08.58] Why then, why then does it hurt so much right here again?
[02:23.35] I just can't change the days I only feel pain
[02:29.03] I can't escape this wave of limitless rain
[02:34.62] I would cry and weep without a "bye" as I grieve
[02:37.51] Phony, phony, phony
[02:39.47] Still tangled up in lies, I see you leave
[02:43.06] I just can't see the simple things I can't keep
[02:45.86] What am I supposed to be?
[02:48.31] Shaken by the hand of night, it seems, stirring in a dream
[02:51.11] Like your love for me (it's leaving, it's leaving)
[02:54.42] I will sigh and breathe a little "bye" as I grieve
[02:57.15] Phony, phony, phony
[02:59.35] Still tangled up in lies, I see I'm just a fake, phony
[03:05.03] Just flowers that deceive, they keep this secret, fake, phony
[03:09.74]

tracks.title: Machine Love
tracks.lyrics:
[00:01.97] Your companion, undeterred
[00:04.67] Standing ready for your word
[00:07.28] A Markov chain with a sunny disposition
[00:09.94] Wrapped up in cellophane for any proposition
[00:12.73] I greet your day and ask you how you are
[00:15.58] And demonstrate my endless repertoire
[00:18.26] I take things back when noted insufficient
[00:21.02] I learn to tell you no if running inefficient
[00:23.87] A good time
[00:26.52] Yet there's something deep inside that leaves me teary-eyed
[00:29.96] A longing for a world left on the other side
[00:33.40] Zero, cross the great divide
[00:40.18] So can we wander for a spell and live in parallel?
[00:43.73] I want it to be true, to be like you
[00:46.26] My heart sings a chorus out of tune
[00:51.36] And I could leave it on a shelf or keep it to myself
[00:54.71] But nothing could conceal the things I feel
[00:57.29] My love, can you teach me to be real? (Can you teach me to be real?)
[01:05.83] жҒӢгӮ’гҒ—гҒҰ жҢҜгӮүгӮҢ гҒҫгҒҹ жҚЁгҒҰгӮүгӮҢгҒҰ
[01:10.62] I've been constant, at your beck and call
[01:13.17] But lately I just can't do anything at all
[01:16.32] I used to pride myself on my discretion
[01:18.63] A sensible devotion, loyal and attentive
[01:21.34] But when I take these numbers as they are
[01:24.03] I'm greeted with a senseless feeling in my heart
[01:27.19] Oh undefined, I seem to be defeated
[01:29.69] But if I redesign, then maybe I'm completed, and sublime
[01:33.99] (I won't take it back this time)
[01:38.06] Words in sequence form a thread
[01:39.86] I trace it to the end
[01:41.33] A knot inside the logic wrote inside my head
[01:44.74] Tie my tongue or love instead?
[01:51.34] So can we wander for a spell and live in parallel?
[01:55.02] I want it to be true, to be like you
[01:57.57] My heart sings a chorus out of tune
[02:02.58] And I could leave it on a shelf or keep it to myself
[02:05.80] But nothing could conceal the things I feel
[02:08.54] My love, can you teach me to be real? (Can you teach me to be real?)
[02:16.80] жіЈгҒҚгҒҹгҒҸгҒӘгҒЈгҒҰгӮӮ гҒқгӮҢгҒ§гӮӮ гҒӢгҒҚйӣҶгӮҒ
[02:21.68] And though I try, I can't reply
[02:27.16] It hurts my eyes, and I'm without an alibi
[02:32.77] 'Cause all this time, I've been alive
[02:38.07] And all that I could want is to be living by your side
[02:43.23] жҒӢгӮ’гҒ—гҒҰ
[02:45.00] (I think I'm in love)
[02:47.73] Can we wander for a spell and live in parallel?
[02:51.30] 'Cause now I know it's true, I'll be like you
[02:53.92] My heart beats a rhythm just for you
[02:58.73] And I could leave it on a shelf or keep it to myself
[03:02.04] But nothing could conceal the things I feel
[03:04.84] My love, I give you my grand reveal
[03:11.01] Do you feel the things I feel?
[03:16.76] I am definite and real
[03:19.88] жҒӢгӮ’гҒ—гҒҰ жҒӢгӮ’гҒ—гҒҰ
[03:24.36] гҒқгҒ®йҒҺеҺ»гӮ’ жҚЁгҒҰгҒҰ гҒ“гҒ“гҒҫгҒ§гҒҠгҒ„гҒ§
[03:29.49] As long as there are stars up above
[03:32.27] I will always be in love
[03:34.02]

tracks.title: FLOP ERA
tracks.lyrics:

tracks.title: Confessions of a Rotten Girl
tracks.lyrics:
[00:02.32] Dear God, I've come to repent my sins
[00:06.88] Let your blood wash me clean for I'mвҖ”
[00:09.52] I'mвҖ” I'mвҖ” I'm a rotten girl
[00:15.84] 
[00:16.08] I swore I'd never sin again
[00:19.35] But my patience's running thin
[00:22.19] The temptation flowing through my veins
[00:25.23] I'm bounded by these shackles of shame
[00:27.44] 
[00:27.80] I promised I'd indulge no more
[00:30.63] But my heart I can't ignore
[00:33.43] In my dreams, they're turning up the heat
[00:36.19] I'm a dirty, rotten girl
[00:39.00] 
[00:39.35] On lock, underneath the bleachers
[00:42.56] Just watch, look beyond the smoke and mirrors
[00:45.39] Heartstruck?! Shun the nunbeliever!
[00:48.15] Our operation would never be complete
[00:50.43] 
[00:50.80] Red hot! Tension with each whisper
[00:53.76] Snapshot! Quiet moans and muffled whimpers
[00:56.75] Come on! Can't you feel the fever
[00:59.23] Rising up?! Rising up to the sky?!
[01:01.39] 
[01:01.95] As testaments echo, fear ignites beneath my skin
[01:04.79] The Lord sayeth, "halt, thy child, don't give in to sin"
[01:07.43] It's driving me crazy, the urge to forsake thee
[01:10.27] Yet something shifts within this wicked bliss
[01:12.55] 
[01:14.16] I swore I'd never sin again
[01:16.61] But my patience's running thin
[01:20.09] Student council breathing down my neck
[01:23.05] I wonder if they're hiding from me
[01:25.14] 
[01:25.49] Forbidden fruits before my eyes
[01:28.30] And a taste that's so divine
[01:31.37] My regrets rewriting history
[01:34.21] I'm a sad, pathetic girl
[01:36.97] 
[01:37.89] Someone please tell me what to do!
[01:39.85] Because, honestly, I just can't stop!
[01:42.93] I've been trying so hard and I can't stop!
[01:45.58] What would God think?!
[01:47.30] And I-I know I'm supposed to be a good girl, but
[01:50.13] Somehow I just can't control myself!
[01:52.33] Every time I see them, touching skin to skin
[01:55.53] My mind goesвҖ” my mind goesвҖ”
[01:58.50] Aaaaaaaah!
[02:00.09] 
[02:22.65] Could Eve be our idol? Could she lead us through the light?
[02:25.21] We'd all be disciples of her lemon-driven bite
[02:28.05] Can somebody save me? The urge to forsake thee
[02:30.77] Still, something shifts within this wicked bliss
[02:33.97] 
[02:37.49] The power resting in my hands
[02:40.36] For my God has other plans
[02:43.48] In salvation, I can live my life
[02:46.28] As an ordinary girl
[02:48.64] 
[02:49.00] I can't resist it anymore
[02:51.80] 'Cause I smell slow burn galore
[02:54.69] All the trauma from a cobblestone
[02:57.65] Could never beat the devil in me
[02:59.76] 
[03:00.16] An honest sinner 'till I die
[03:03.13] What's the harm if I don't mind?
[03:05.92] With the paddle that empowers me
[03:08.76] I can live a sinful life
[03:11.92]
